channel.title: Shoulder Milling Inserts,Tungsten Carbide Milling Inserts,CNC Cutting Tool
channel.description: We Specialize In Carbide Shoulder Milling Inserts and Tools For Industrial Grooving and Threading Projects. Don't Sacrifice Quality For Cost! We Strive To Serve Quality Products At Sensible Costs.

item.title: Factory Supply Cemented Carbide Inserts Cutting Tools CNMG070310 Milling Inserts
item.description: Code: CNMG070310
item.author: Shoulder Milling Inserts

item.title: Factory Wholesale CNC Lathe Cutting Tools Solid Carbide Inserts Milling Inserts Bdmt11t308er-Jt
item.description:
Code: BDMT11t308ER-JT

Grade Information

Description

1.Made from 100% virgin raw material;
2. Produced with advanced equipments and process;
3. All products go through in-process and final inspection;
4. Free online technical service available;
5. Stable and continuous production ability.


Packing & Delivery

Our Services

✔ Pre-sales Service: 24hours online by WhatsApp/ Wechat
✔ Sales Service: Professional sales quotation and precision price for you
✔ After-sales Service: 1-3 days by the delivery time as usual
✔ Technical Support: 20 years engineer in the CNC area

FAQ

Q1: Are you a trading company or manufacturer
A1: We are a manufacturer of carbide inserts. Our factory located in Zhuzhou  City, Hunan Province. Welcome to visit our factory!
Q2: What is your minimum order requirement?
A2: OEM and customization are available. we accept the small trial order, big order will get a big discount. and try our best to service our customers.
Q3: What is the delivery time for production?
A3: We usually prepare rich stock for delivery upon payment, 30-35 days for items without stock.
Q4: Can you make Non-Standard items?
A4: We are specialized in inserts R&D, welcome specical items .
Q5: What about the package?
A5: We use plastic boxes to pack our products, and filled plastic is shockproof and transported in cartons. also It can make as you need and depend on the shapes of the product.
item.author: Shoulder Milling Inserts

item.title: Tungsten carbide cutting tools MPHW Indexable milling inserts for Surface Milling Cutters
item.description:
Code: MPHW0603TN

Product Description

Grades Description

CVD coated cemented carbide
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YC1015MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent wear resistance in combination with MT-TiCN,fine grained AL2O3TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for finishing of steel.P05-P15
YC1025MT-CVD coated, Cutting edge with good toughness in combination with  TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating,which is suitable for semi-finishing of steel.P10~P25
YC1035MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent toughness and plastic deformation resistance in combination with TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for roughness of steel.P20-P35
YC1125Special strength toughness of the insert substrates,perfect combinations with MT-TiCN,ultra fine AL2O3,coatings ,common grade for steel,suitable for steel,cast iron,stainess steel in semi-finishing,finishingP10~P25
YC1315The combination of high wear-resistant substrate with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coatings,is a ideal grade of finishing processing of steel,stainess steel in the case of hight speed cutting.P10~P25
YC1325With optimized toughness and hardness of the substrate and MT-TiN, fine grain Al2O3 and TiN coating and with a special post-treatment process, the formation of excellent performance of the double-color coating, suitable for steel, stainless steel and cast iron in semi-finishing and finishingP10~P25
YC1335Substrate with high strength and strong resistance to plastic deformation combined with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coating having great toughness,is suitable for light load ronghing of steel,stainess steel and cast ironP10~P25
YC2105MT-CVD coated, the super fine grain size substrate with excellent hardness in combination with  Al2O3(extra thick)  coating, the smooth surface, which is suitable for turning and milling of grey cast iron at high speedK05-K15
YC2115MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent hardness and stripping resistance in combination with Al2O3(thick) coating, the smooth surface of the tools, which is suitable for turning and milling of cast iron at middle and high speed.K10-K30
YC2215High wear-resistant substrate, new generation coating process with perfect combination of MTTI (CN), Super Al2O3, TiCN coating, initial grades of ductile cast iron, forged cast iron, high cutting speed allowanceK10~K30

 

PVD coated cemented carbide 
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YP30252-4um TiALN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel,  cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishingP10-P25
K15-K30
YP31252-4um ALCr+ALCrSiN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel , cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishing P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP32252-4um AlCr + AlCrSiN PVD coating, combined with ultra-fine particle matrix, has high wear resistance, suitable for finishing and semi-finishing of heat-treated steel ,stainless steel and quenched steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP3330The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with ultra-fine particle substrates, has high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of  stainless and hardened steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YR3025Unique material matrix, with 2-4um TiAlN PVD coating, with high toughness and heat resistance, suitable for high temperature alloy, heat resistant alloy and other difficult to process materials finishing, semi-finishingS10-S25
YR3325The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with unique rare metal substrates, offer high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of superalloys and heat resistant alloysS10-S25

Our Advantages

 

1. High impact resistance, excellent adhesion, reduced friction.
2. Superior wear protection, temperature and oxidation stability.
3. Provides perfect turning surface of the work piece .
4. Less tool breakage, Long tool life.
5. A reliable and secure performance every time.

Production Process


Packing & Delivery

Our Services

✔ Pre-sales Service: 24hours online by WhatsApp/ Wechat
✔ Sales Service: Professional sales quotation and precision price for you
✔ After-sales Service: 1-3 days by the delivery time as usual
✔ Technical Support: 20 years engineer in the CNC area

FAQ

Q1: Are you a trading company or manufacturer
A1: We are a manufacturer of carbide inserts. Our factory located in Zhuzhou  City, Hunan Province. Welcome to visit our factory!
Q2: What is your minimum order requirement?
A2: OEM and customization are available. we accept the small trial order, big order will get a big discount. and try our best to service our customers.
Q3: What is the delivery time for production?
A3: We usually prepare rich stock for delivery upon payment, 30-35 days for items without stock.
Q4: Can you make Non-Standard items?
A4: We are specialized in inserts R&D, welcome specical items .
Q5: What about the package?
A5: We use plastic boxes to pack our products, and filled plastic is shockproof and transported in cartons. also It can make as you need and depend on the shapes of the product.
item.author: Shoulder Milling Inserts

item.title: Excellent Performance cemented carbide milling inserts APMT1003PDER Use for Surface Milling and Shoulder Milling Cutters
item.description:
Code: APMT1003PDER

Description


● Our carbide inserts sold very well in the domestic market and Europe,South America,Turkish, Indian market.
● It is the best quality, low price. We can satisfy all customers' requirements.

PVD Coated Cemented Carbide

GradeDescription
YP30152-4um TiALN PVDcoated, combinating with fine particles' substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials, high-temperature alloy Ti alloy in finishing,semi-finishing
YP30252-4um TiALN PVDcoated, combinating with ultra fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials, stainless steel steel cast alloy in finishing, semi-finishing
YP3035PVD coated, combinating with high-resistant substrates, suitable for all materials in roughing, semi-finishing
YP33302-4um TiALN +TiN PVDcoated, combinating with fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials, high-temperature alloy Ti alloy in finishing, semi-finishing
YP31252-4um ALCr+ALCrSiN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra fine particles'substrates with high-toughness,suitabe for all materials, stainless steel steel cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishing


Packing & Delivery

Our Services

✔ Pre-sales Service: 24hours online by WhatsApp/ Wechat
✔ Sales Service: Professional sales quotation and precision price for you
✔ After-sales Service: 1-3 days by the delivery time as usual
✔ Technical Support: 20 years engineer in the CNC area

FAQ

Q1: Are you a trading company or manufacturer
A1: We are a manufacturer of carbide inserts. Our factory located in Zhuzhou  City, Hunan Province. Welcome to visit our factory!
Q2: What is your minimum order requirement?
A2: OEM and customization are available. we accept the small trial order, big order will get a big discount. and try our best to service our customers.
Q3: What is the delivery time for production?
A3: We usually prepare rich stock for delivery upon payment, 30-35 days for items without stock.
Q4: Can you make Non-Standard items?
A4: We are specialized in inserts R&D, welcome specical items .
Q5: What about the package?
A5: We use plastic boxes to pack our products, and filled plastic is shockproof and transported in cartons. also It can make as you need and depend on the shapes of the product.

item.title: Factory Price Lathe cutter tools for Surface Milling Cutters with PVD coating 3pkt150508r-M/3pkt190608r-M/3pkt100408r/3pkt060308r-M
item.description:
Code: 3pkt150508r-M/ 3pkt190608r-M/ 3pkt100408r/ 3pkt060308r-M

Product Description


Dimension

                         
TYPEdtapar
3PKT060304R-M5.32.84.710.4
3PKT100408R-M6.9471.20.8
3PKT150508R-M10.75111.80.8
3PKT150508R-ML10.75111.80.8
3PKT190608R-M13.561520.8

Grades Description

CVD coated cemented carbide
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YC1015MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent wear resistance in combination with MT-TiCN,fine grained AL2O3TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for finishing of steel.P05-P15
YC1025MT-CVD coated, Cutting edge with good toughness in combination with  TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating,which is suitable for semi-finishing of steel.P10~P25
YC1035MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent toughness and plastic deformation resistance in combination with TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for roughness of steel.P20-P35
YC1125Special strength toughness of the insert substrates,perfect combinations with MT-TiCN,ultra fine AL2O3,coatings ,common grade for steel,suitable for steel,cast iron,stainess steel in semi-finishing,finishingP10~P25
YC1315The combination of high wear-resistant substrate with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coatings,is a ideal grade of finishing processing of steel,stainess steel in the case of hight speed cutting.P10~P25
YC1325With optimized toughness and hardness of the substrate and MT-TiN, fine grain Al2O3 and TiN coating and with a special post-treatment process, the formation of excellent performance of the double-color coating, suitable for steel, stainless steel and cast iron in semi-finishing and finishingP10~P25
YC1335Substrate with high strength and strong resistance to plastic deformation combined with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coating having great toughness,is suitable for light load ronghing of steel,stainess steel and cast ironP10~P25
YC2105MT-CVD coated, the super fine grain size substrate with excellent hardness in combination with  Al2O3(extra thick)  coating, the smooth surface, which is suitable for turning and milling of grey cast iron at high speedK05-K15
YC2115MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent hardness and stripping resistance in combination with Al2O3(thick) coating, the smooth surface of the tools, which is suitable for turning and milling of cast iron at middle and high speed.K10-K30
YC2215High wear-resistant substrate, new generation coating process with perfect combination of MTTI (CN), Super Al2O3, TiCN coating, initial grades of ductile cast iron, forged cast iron, high cutting speed allowanceK10~K30

 

PVD coated cemented carbide 
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YP30252-4um TiALN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel,  cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishingP10-P25
K15-K30
YP31252-4um ALCr+ALCrSiN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel , cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishing P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP32252-4um AlCr + AlCrSiN PVD coating, combined with ultra-fine particle matrix, has high wear resistance, suitable for finishing and semi-finishing of heat-treated steel ,stainless steel and quenched steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP3330The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with ultra-fine particle substrates, has high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of  stainless and hardened steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YR3025Unique material matrix, with 2-4um TiAlN PVD coating, with high toughness and heat resistance, suitable for high temperature alloy, heat resistant alloy and other difficult to process materials finishing, semi-finishingS10-S25
YR3325The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with unique rare metal substrates, offer high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of superalloys and heat resistant alloysS10-S25

 

Our Advantages

 

1. Durability and Quality
2. CNC precision machining
3. High working efficiency

Production Process

 


Packing & Delivery

Our Services

✔ Pre-sales Service: 24hours online by WhatsApp/ Wechat
✔ Sales Service: Professional sales quotation and precision price for you
✔ After-sales Service: 1-3 days by the delivery time as usual
✔ Technical Support: 20 years engineer in the CNC area

FAQ

Q1: Are you a trading company or manufacturer
A1: We are a manufacturer of carbide inserts. Our factory located in Zhuzhou  City, Hunan Province. Welcome to visit our factory!
Q2: What is your minimum order requirement?
A2: OEM and customization are available. we accept the small trial order, big order will get a big discount. and try our best to service our customers.
Q3: What is the delivery time for production?
A3: We usually prepare rich stock for delivery upon payment, 30-35 days for items without stock.
Q4: Can you make Non-Standard items?
A4: We are specialized in inserts R&D, welcome specical items .
Q5: What about the package?
A5: We use plastic boxes to pack our products, and filled plastic is shockproof and transported in cartons. also It can make as you need and depend on the shapes of the product.
item.author: Shoulder Milling Inserts

item.title: High precision working Cemented carbide milling inserts JDMT090208 Use for Shoulder Milling and Vertical milling cutters
item.description:
Code: JDMT090208

Product Description

Grades Description

CVD coated cemented carbide
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YC1015MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent wear resistance in combination with MT-TiCN,fine grained AL2O3TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for finishing of steel.P05-P15
YC1025MT-CVD coated, Cutting edge with good toughness in combination with  TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating,which is suitable for semi-finishing of steel.P10~P25
YC1035MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent toughness and plastic deformation resistance in combination with TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for roughness of steel.P20-P35
YC1125Special strength toughness of the insert substrates,perfect combinations with MT-TiCN,ultra fine AL2O3,coatings ,common grade for steel,suitable for steel,cast iron,stainess steel in semi-finishing,finishingP10~P25
YC1315The combination of high wear-resistant substrate with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coatings,is a ideal grade of finishing processing of steel,stainess steel in the case of hight speed cutting.P10~P25
YC1325With optimized toughness and hardness of the substrate and MT-TiN, fine grain Al2O3 and TiN coating and with a special post-treatment process, the formation of excellent performance of the double-color coating, suitable for steel, stainless steel and cast iron in semi-finishing and finishingP10~P25
YC1335Substrate with high strength and strong resistance to plastic deformation combined with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coating having great toughness,is suitable for light load ronghing of steel,stainess steel and cast ironP10~P25
YC2105MT-CVD coated, the super fine grain size substrate with excellent hardness in combination with  Al2O3(extra thick)  coating, the smooth surface, which is suitable for turning and milling of grey cast iron at high speedK05-K15
YC2115MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent hardness and stripping resistance in combination with Al2O3(thick) coating, the smooth surface of the tools, which is suitable for turning and milling of cast iron at middle and high speed.K10-K30
YC2215High wear-resistant substrate, new generation coating process with perfect combination of MTTI (CN), Super Al2O3, TiCN coating, initial grades of ductile cast iron, forged cast iron, high cutting speed allowanceK10~K30

 

PVD coated cemented carbide 
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YP30252-4um TiALN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel,  cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishingP10-P25
K15-K30
YP31252-4um ALCr+ALCrSiN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel , cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishing P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP32252-4um AlCr + AlCrSiN PVD coating, combined with ultra-fine particle matrix, has high wear resistance, suitable for finishing and semi-finishing of heat-treated steel ,stainless steel and quenched steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP3330The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with ultra-fine particle substrates, has high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of  stainless and hardened steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YR3025Unique material matrix, with 2-4um TiAlN PVD coating, with high toughness and heat resistance, suitable for high temperature alloy, heat resistant alloy and other difficult to process materials finishing, semi-finishingS10-S25
YR3325The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with unique rare metal substrates, offer high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of superalloys and heat resistant alloysS10-S25

 

Our Advantages

 

1. Made from 100% virgin raw material;
2. Produced with advanced equipment and process;
3. All products go through in-process and final inspection;
4. Free online technical service available;
5. Stable and continuous production ability.

Production Process

 


Packing & Delivery

Our Services

✔ Pre-sales Service: 24hours online by WhatsApp/ Wechat
✔ Sales Service: Professional sales quotation and precision price for you
✔ After-sales Service: 1-3 days by the delivery time as usual
✔ Technical Support: 20 years engineer in the CNC area

FAQ

Q1: Are you a trading company or manufacturer
A1: We are a manufacturer of carbide inserts. Our factory located in Zhuzhou  City, Hunan Province. Welcome to visit our factory!
Q2: What is your minimum order requirement?
A2: OEM and customization are available. we accept the small trial order, big order will get a big discount. and try our best to service our customers.
Q3: What is the delivery time for production?
A3: We usually prepare rich stock for delivery upon payment, 30-35 days for items without stock.
Q4: Can you make Non-Standard items?
A4: We are specialized in inserts R&D, welcome specical items .
Q5: What about the package?
A5: We use plastic boxes to pack our products, and filled plastic is shockproof and transported in cartons. also It can make as you need and depend on the shapes of the product.

Dimension

                      
TYPEL1L2S1F1Re

1. High impact resistance, excellent adhesion, reduced friction.
2. Superior wear protection, temperature and oxidation stability.

item.title: 4NKT060308R-M top quality CNC Cutting Tools cemented Carbide Milling Inserts with PVD coating
item.description:
Code: 4NKT060308R-M

 

Product Description

Grades Description

CVD coated cemented carbide
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YC1015MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent wear resistance in combination with MT-TiCN,fine grained AL2O3TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for finishing of steel.P05-P15
YC1025MT-CVD coated, Cutting edge with good toughness in combination with  TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating,which is suitable for semi-finishing of steel.P10~P25
YC1035MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent toughness and plastic deformation resistance in combination with TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for roughness of steel.P20-P35
YC1125Special strength toughness of the insert substrates,perfect combinations with MT-TiCN,ultra fine AL2O3,coatings ,common grade for steel,suitable for steel,cast iron,stainess steel in semi-finishing,finishingP10~P25
YC1315The combination of high wear-resistant substrate with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coatings,is a ideal grade of finishing processing of steel,stainess steel in the case of hight speed cutting.P10~P25
YC1325With optimized toughness and hardness of the substrate and MT-TiN, fine grain Al2O3 and TiN coating and with a special post-treatment process, the formation of excellent performance of the double-color coating, suitable for steel, stainless steel and cast iron in semi-finishing and finishingP10~P25
YC1335Substrate with high strength and strong resistance to plastic deformation combined with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coating having great toughness,is suitable for light load ronghing of steel,stainess steel and cast ironP10~P25
YC2105MT-CVD coated, the super fine grain size substrate with excellent hardness in combination with  Al2O3(extra thick)  coating, the smooth surface, which is suitable for turning and milling of grey cast iron at high speedK05-K15
YC2115MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent hardness and stripping resistance in combination with Al2O3(thick) coating, the smooth surface of the tools, which is suitable for turning and milling of cast iron at middle and high speed.K10-K30
YC2215High wear-resistant substrate, new generation coating process with perfect combination of MTTI (CN), Super Al2O3, TiCN coating, initial grades of ductile cast iron, forged cast iron, high cutting speed allowanceK10~K30

 

PVD coated cemented carbide 
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YP30252-4um TiALN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel,  cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishingP10-P25
K15-K30
YP31252-4um ALCr+ALCrSiN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel , cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishing P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP32252-4um AlCr + AlCrSiN PVD coating, combined with ultra-fine particle matrix, has high wear resistance, suitable for finishing and semi-finishing of heat-treated steel ,stainless steel and quenched steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP3330The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with ultra-fine particle substrates, has high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of  stainless and hardened steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YR3025Unique material matrix, with 2-4um TiAlN PVD coating, with high toughness and heat resistance, suitable for high temperature alloy, heat resistant alloy and other difficult to process materials finishing, semi-finishingS10-S25
YR3325The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with unique rare metal substrates, offer high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of superalloys and heat resistant alloysS10-S25

Our Advantages

 

We manufactures and supplies literally hundreds of both standard and custom size milling inserts for most applications. According to the different hardness of mould work piece, we can evaluate the service life of cutting tools accurately.

Production Process

Packing & Delivery

Our Services

✔ Pre-sales Service: 24hours online by WhatsApp/ Wechat
✔ Sales Service: Professional sales quotation and precision price for you
✔ After-sales Service: 1-3 days by the delivery time as usual
✔ Technical Support: 20 years engineer in the CNC area

FAQ

Q1: Are you a trading company or manufacturer
A1: We are a manufacturer of carbide inserts. Our factory located in Zhuzhou  City, Hunan Province. Welcome to visit our factory!
Q2: What is your minimum order requirement?
A2: OEM and customization are available. we accept the small trial order, big order will get a big discount. and try our best to service our customers.
Q3: What is the delivery time for production?
A3: We usually prepare rich stock for delivery upon payment, 30-35 days for items without stock.
Q4: Can you make Non-Standard items?
A4: We are specialized in inserts R&D, welcome specical items .
Q5: What about the package?
A5: We use plastic boxes to pack our products, and filled plastic is shockproof and transported in cartons. also It can make as you need and depend on the shapes of the product.
item.author: Shoulder Milling Inserts

item.title: Using for shoulder cutters APKT High Quality Inserts lathe cutting tools indexable milling inserts
item.description:
Code: APKT170508PDER

Product Description

Our Advantages

● Keep improving quality leading
● Not easy to stick knife
● Durable
● Row quick cutting
● Good finish
● Wide range of processing

PVD Coated Cemented Carbide

GradeDescription
YP30152-4um TiALN PVDcoated, combinating with fine particles' substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials, high-temperature alloy Ti alloy in finishing,semi-finishing
YP30252-4um TiALN PVDcoated, combinating with ultra fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials, stainless steel steel cast alloy in finishing, semi-finishing
YP3035PVD coated, combinating with high-resistant substrates, suitable for all materials in roughing, semi-finishing
YP33302-4um TiALN +TiN PVDcoated, combinating with fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials, high-temperature alloy Ti alloy in finishing, semi-finishing
YP31252-4um ALCr+ALCrSiN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra fine particles'substrates with high-toughness,suitabe for all materials, stainless steel steel cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishing


Packing & Delivery

Our Services

✔ Pre-sales Service: 24hours online by WhatsApp/ Wechat
✔ Sales Service: Professional sales quotation and precision price for you
✔ After-sales Service: 1-3 days by the delivery time as usual
✔ Technical Support: 20 years engineer in the CNC area

FAQ

Q1: Are you a trading company or manufacturer
A1: We are a manufacturer of carbide inserts. Our factory located in Zhuzhou  City, Hunan Province. Welcome to visit our factory!
Q2: What is your minimum order requirement?
A2: OEM and customization are available. we accept the small trial order, big order will get a big discount. and try our best to service our customers.
Q3: What is the delivery time for production?
A3: We usually prepare rich stock for delivery upon payment, 30-35 days for items without stock.
Q4: Can you make Non-Standard items?
A4: We are specialized in inserts R&D, welcome specical items .
Q5: What about the package?
A5: We use plastic boxes to pack our products, and filled plastic is shockproof and transported in cartons. also It can make as you need and depend on the shapes of the product.

item.title: JDMW Insert Fast Feed JDMW1204 / 1405 Metal Cutting Tools Carbide Indexable Inserts
item.description: Code: JDMW120420ZDSR-FT / JDMW140520ZDSR-FT
item.author: Shoulder Milling Inserts

item.title: Axmt170508peer-G High Efficiency Machining Tungsten Carbide Inserts Indexable Milling Inserts
item.description:
Code: AXMT170508PEER-G

Product Description

Grades Description

CVD coated cemented carbide
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YC1015MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent wear resistance in combination with MT-TiCN,fine grained AL2O3TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for finishing of steel.P05-P15
YC1025MT-CVD coated, Cutting edge with good toughness in combination with  TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating,which is suitable for semi-finishing of steel.P10~P25
YC1035MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent toughness and plastic deformation resistance in combination with TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for roughness of steel.P20-P35
YC1125Special strength toughness of the insert substrates,perfect combinations with MT-TiCN,ultra fine AL2O3,coatings ,common grade for steel,suitable for steel,cast iron,stainess steel in semi-finishing,finishingP10~P25
YC1315The combination of high wear-resistant substrate with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coatings,is a ideal grade of finishing processing of steel,stainess steel in the case of hight speed cutting.P10~P25
YC1325With optimized toughness and hardness of the substrate and MT-TiN, fine grain Al2O3 and TiN coating and with a special post-treatment process, the formation of excellent performance of the double-color coating, suitable for steel, stainless steel and cast iron in semi-finishing and finishingP10~P25
YC1335Substrate with high strength and strong resistance to plastic deformation combined with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coating having great toughness,is suitable for light load ronghing of steel,stainess steel and cast ironP10~P25
YC2105MT-CVD coated, the super fine grain size substrate with excellent hardness in combination with  Al2O3(extra thick)  coating, the smooth surface, which is suitable for turning and milling of grey cast iron at high speedK05-K15
YC2115MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent hardness and stripping resistance in combination with Al2O3(thick) coating, the smooth surface of the tools, which is suitable for turning and milling of cast iron at middle and high speed.K10-K30
YC2215High wear-resistant substrate, new generation coating process with perfect combination of MTTI (CN), Super Al2O3, TiCN coating, initial grades of ductile cast iron, forged cast iron, high cutting speed allowanceK10~K30

 

PVD coated cemented carbide 
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YP30252-4um TiALN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel,  cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishingP10-P25
K15-K30
YP31252-4um ALCr+ALCrSiN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel , cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishing P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP32252-4um AlCr + AlCrSiN PVD coating, combined with ultra-fine particle matrix, has high wear resistance, suitable for finishing and semi-finishing of heat-treated steel ,stainless steel and quenched steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP3330The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with ultra-fine particle substrates, has high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of  stainless and hardened steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YR3025Unique material matrix, with 2-4um TiAlN PVD coating, with high toughness and heat resistance, suitable for high temperature alloy, heat resistant alloy and other difficult to process materials finishing, semi-finishingS10-S25
YR3325The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with unique rare metal substrates, offer high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of superalloys and heat resistant alloysS10-S25

Our Advantages

 

1.Made from 100% virgin raw material;
2. Produced with advanced equipments and process;
3. All products go through in-process and final inspection;
4. Free online technical service available;
5. Stable and continuous production ability.

Production Process

 


Packing & Delivery

Our Services

✔ Pre-sales Service: 24hours online by WhatsApp/ Wechat
✔ Sales Service: Professional sales quotation and precision price for you
✔ After-sales Service: 1-3 days by the delivery time as usual
✔ Technical Support: 20 years engineer in the CNC area

FAQ

Q1: Are you a trading company or manufacturer
A1: We are a manufacturer of carbide inserts. Our factory located in Zhuzhou  City, Hunan Province. Welcome to visit our factory!
Q2: What is your minimum order requirement?
A2: OEM and customization are available. we accept the small trial order, big order will get a big discount. and try our best to service our customers.
Q3: What is the delivery time for production?
A3: We usually prepare rich stock for delivery upon payment, 30-35 days for items without stock.
Q4: Can you make Non-Standard items?
A4: We are specialized in inserts R&D, welcome specical items .
Q5: What about the package?
A5: We use plastic boxes to pack our products, and filled plastic is shockproof and transported in cartons. also It can make as you need and depend on the shapes of the product.

item.title: Mill 4-11 Lnpu110408srge/Lnpu110412srge tungsten carbide milling shoulder inserts with PVD coating
item.description:
Code: Lnpu110408srge/Lnpu110412srge

 

Product Description


Grades Description

CVD coated cemented carbide
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YC1015MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent wear resistance in combination with MT-TiCN,fine grained AL2O3TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for finishing of steel.P05-P15
YC1025MT-CVD coated, Cutting edge with good toughness in combination with  TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating,which is suitable for semi-finishing of steel.P10~P25
YC1035MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent toughness and plastic deformation resistance in combination with TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for roughness of steel.P20-P35
YC1125Special strength toughness of the insert substrates,perfect combinations with MT-TiCN,ultra fine AL2O3,coatings ,common grade for steel,suitable for steel,cast iron,stainess steel in semi-finishing,finishingP10~P25
YC1315The combination of high wear-resistant substrate with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coatings,is a ideal grade of finishing processing of steel,stainess steel in the case of hight speed cutting.P10~P25
YC1325With optimized toughness and hardness of the substrate and MT-TiN, fine grain Al2O3 and TiN coating and with a special post-treatment process, the formation of excellent performance of the double-color coating, suitable for steel, stainless steel and cast iron in semi-finishing and finishingP10~P25
YC1335Substrate with high strength and strong resistance to plastic deformation combined with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coating having great toughness,is suitable for light load ronghing of steel,stainess steel and cast ironP10~P25
YC2105MT-CVD coated, the super fine grain size substrate with excellent hardness in combination with  Al2O3(extra thick)  coating, the smooth surface, which is suitable for turning and milling of grey cast iron at high speedK05-K15
YC2115MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent hardness and stripping resistance in combination with Al2O3(thick) coating, the smooth surface of the tools, which is suitable for turning and milling of cast iron at middle and high speed.K10-K30
YC2215High wear-resistant substrate, new generation coating process with perfect combination of MTTI (CN), Super Al2O3, TiCN coating, initial grades of ductile cast iron, forged cast iron, high cutting speed allowanceK10~K30

 

PVD coated cemented carbide 
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YP30252-4um TiALN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel,  cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishingP10-P25
K15-K30
YP31252-4um ALCr+ALCrSiN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel , cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishing P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP32252-4um AlCr + AlCrSiN PVD coating, combined with ultra-fine particle matrix, has high wear resistance, suitable for finishing and semi-finishing of heat-treated steel ,stainless steel and quenched steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP3330The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with ultra-fine particle substrates, has high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of  stainless and hardened steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YR3025Unique material matrix, with 2-4um TiAlN PVD coating, with high toughness and heat resistance, suitable for high temperature alloy, heat resistant alloy and other difficult to process materials finishing, semi-finishingS10-S25
YR3325The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with unique rare metal substrates, offer high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of superalloys and heat resistant alloysS10-S25

 

Our Advantages

 

1. Virgin material of tungsten carbide
2. High density
3. Good wear-resistance
4. Accept trial order

Production Process


Packing & Delivery

Our Services

✔ Pre-sales Service: 24hours online by WhatsApp/ Wechat
✔ Sales Service: Professional sales quotation and precision price for you
✔ After-sales Service: 1-3 days by the delivery time as usual
✔ Technical Support: 20 years engineer in the CNC area

FAQ

Q1: Are you a trading company or manufacturer
A1: We are a manufacturer of carbide inserts. Our factory located in Zhuzhou  City, Hunan Province. Welcome to visit our factory!
Q2: What is your minimum order requirement?
A2: OEM and customization are available. we accept the small trial order, big order will get a big discount. and try our best to service our customers.
Q3: What is the delivery time for production?
A3: We usually prepare rich stock for delivery upon payment, 30-35 days for items without stock.
Q4: Can you make Non-Standard items?
A4: We are specialized in inserts R&D, welcome specical items .
Q5: What about the package?
A5: We use plastic boxes to pack our products, and filled plastic is shockproof and transported in cartons. also It can make as you need and depend on the shapes of the product.

item.title: CNC Milling Lathe Tools Tungsten Carbide Inserts Wnmu080608-GM for Shoulder Milling Cutters
item.description:
Code: WNMU050408EN / WNMU080608EN

Product Description

Dimension

                    
ISOLSdr
WNMU050408EN-GM54.23.40.8 
WNMU080608EN-GM8 6.65 6.2 0.8 

Grades Description

CVD coated cemented carbide
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YC1015MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent wear resistance in combination with MT-TiCN,fine grained AL2O3TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for finishing of steel.P05-P15
YC1025MT-CVD coated, Cutting edge with good toughness in combination with  TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating,which is suitable for semi-finishing of steel.P10~P25
YC1035MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent toughness and plastic deformation resistance in combination with TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for roughness of steel.P20-P35
YC1125Special strength toughness of the insert substrates,perfect combinations with MT-TiCN,ultra fine AL2O3,coatings ,common grade for steel,suitable for steel,cast iron,stainess steel in semi-finishing,finishingP10~P25
YC1315The combination of high wear-resistant substrate with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coatings,is a ideal grade of finishing processing of steel,stainess steel in the case of hight speed cutting.P10~P25
YC1325With optimized toughness and hardness of the substrate and MT-TiN, fine grain Al2O3 and TiN coating and with a special post-treatment process, the formation of excellent performance of the double-color coating, suitable for steel, stainless steel and cast iron in semi-finishing and finishingP10~P25
YC1335Substrate with high strength and strong resistance to plastic deformation combined with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coating having great toughness,is suitable for light load ronghing of steel,stainess steel and cast ironP10~P25
YC2105MT-CVD coated, the super fine grain size substrate with excellent hardness in combination with  Al2O3(extra thick)  coating, the smooth surface, which is suitable for turning and milling of grey cast iron at high speedK05-K15
YC2115MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent hardness and stripping resistance in combination with Al2O3(thick) coating, the smooth surface of the tools, which is suitable for turning and milling of cast iron at middle and high speed.K10-K30
YC2215High wear-resistant substrate, new generation coating process with perfect combination of MTTI (CN), Super Al2O3, TiCN coating, initial grades of ductile cast iron, forged cast iron, high cutting speed allowanceK10~K30

 

PVD coated cemented carbide 
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YP30252-4um TiALN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel,  cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishingP10-P25
K15-K30
YP31252-4um ALCr+ALCrSiN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel , cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishing P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP32252-4um AlCr + AlCrSiN PVD coating, combined with ultra-fine particle matrix, has high wear resistance, suitable for finishing and semi-finishing of heat-treated steel ,stainless steel and quenched steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP3330The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with ultra-fine particle substrates, has high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of  stainless and hardened steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YR3025Unique material matrix, with 2-4um TiAlN PVD coating, with high toughness and heat resistance, suitable for high temperature alloy, heat resistant alloy and other difficult to process materials finishing, semi-finishingS10-S25
YR3325The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with unique rare metal substrates, offer high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of superalloys and heat resistant alloysS10-S25

 

Our Advantages

 

We manufactures and supplies literally hundreds of both standard and custom size milling inserts for most applications.

According to the different hardness of mould work piece, we can evaluate the service life of cutting tools accurately.

 

Production Process


Packing & Delivery

Our Services

✔ Pre-sales Service: 24hours online by WhatsApp/ Wechat
✔ Sales Service: Professional sales quotation and precision price for you
✔ After-sales Service: 1-3 days by the delivery time as usual
✔ Technical Support: 20 years engineer in the CNC area

FAQ

Q1: Are you a trading company or manufacturer
A1: We are a manufacturer of carbide inserts. Our factory located in Zhuzhou  City, Hunan Province. Welcome to visit our factory!
Q2: What is your minimum order requirement?
A2: OEM and customization are available. we accept the small trial order, big order will get a big discount. and try our best to service our customers.
Q3: What is the delivery time for production?
A3: We usually prepare rich stock for delivery upon payment, 30-35 days for items without stock.
Q4: Can you make Non-Standard items?
A4: We are specialized in inserts R&D, welcome specical items .
Q5: What about the package?
A5: We use plastic boxes to pack our products, and filled plastic is shockproof and transported in cartons. also It can make as you need and depend on the shapes of the product.
